accurate.why: All provisions, deadlines, agencies, and the no-additional-funds clause accurately described.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies cardiomyopathy education, AED/CPR access, and research as the bill's purpose.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Notes the bill amends the Public Health Service Act by adding new sections.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes grant eligibility limited to local educational agencies with qualified health care entities, and no additional funds.

major_provisions_covered.why: All four major sections covered accurately.

correct_entities.why: HHS Secretary, CDC Director, NIH Director, local educational agencies correctly identified.
